npm.description: Skip pnpm lockfile artifact updates: pnpm-workspace.yaml references the gitignored vite/ checkout (patched dependencies, workspace importers), so pnpm cannot resolve in Renovate's clone. The renovate-lockfiles workflow regenerates all lockfiles on renovate/** branch pushes instead; its commits are excluded via gitIgnoredAuthors above so Renovate keeps managing the branches.

packageRules.description: Ignore upstream toolchain npm packages (vendored via sync-remote or bumped by the proactive catalog workflow); everything else stays enabled so security alerts get fixed. Lockfiles are regenerated by the renovate-lockfiles workflow because vite/ and rolldown/ are gitignored in Renovate's clone.
Ignore oxc crate updates (bumped by the proactive catalog workflow); other cargo crates stay enabled.
Ignore vite-task git dependency digest updates (bumped via the bump-vite-task workflow).
